creator: ag-freebsd@muc.de
text:
Created attachment 176636
metadata patch file

INN may be configured at compile-time to support both news posting via UUCP (net/freebsd-uucp) by installing a "rnews" binary, as well as allowing any local user to post articles locally with the "inews" binary.

The patch will modify the Makefile and provide two more configuration knobs,
namely 

SETGID_INEWS and 
UUCP_RNEWS,

which set the appropriate GNU configure switches.

See https://www.eyrie.org/~eagle/software/inn/docs-2.6/install.html
for details about the configure switches.
